parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-630 (Risk C, 150 units, RP20.P05.M06.S05-RP20.P06.M02.S18, the P05 fixture closeout + P06 permission-matrix bridge descriptor pack). The delivered implementation is internally consistent and well-guarded: the CP630 registry binding matches the manifest, contract projections, live plan, and next-pack-queue; the eight section row-sets resolve to exactly 150 units (18+22+22+20+10+20+20+18); and the deliverable distribution, independently recomputed from row titles and dataRoomVdrCoreDeliverableType, matches the manifest and registry counts (fixture 30, claude_review 8, implementation 57, security_audit 23, test 16, hermes_evidence 4, ui 12) — a distribution the validator also enforces. The freezeCp610→…→freezeCp630 chain supplies every no-write/no-real-data flag asserted by validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp630P05FixtureCloseoutP06PermissionMatrixBridgeDescriptor, which returns only production_ready_candidate and never an enterprise-trust claim. The authority boundary is correctly encoded throughout (claude_is_final_approval false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, human_final_approval_required true, runtime_opened false, descriptor_only true), and Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor packet/receipt shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false), not product runtime. Three dedicated CP630 tests plus the contract validation script deep-equal contract projections to package code, and index.js re-exports the CP630 API. All closeout evidence (command-evidence, construction-inspection, adjudication, claude-review-result) is correctly still PENDING with production_ready false — the pack makes no premature production_ready or enterprise-trust claim; this hardened review is the gate currently executing. No P0/P1 defects found. Claude remains a read-only, non-final-approval reviewer. Findings are limited to forward-looking closeout preconditions: the full validation command matrix is deferred (P2) and the governance artifacts plus this review's receipt must be normalized before any production_ready flip under human final approval (P3).

findings.title: Full validation command matrix deferred; only the data-room subset is recorded in command-evidence
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only the pack-local commands (node --check on registry/service/validators/test/validator script, npm run rp20:data-room-vdr-core:validate, and node --test packages/data-room/test/model.test.js), all exit_code 0, with status in_progress, production_ready false, and gate_outcome 'pending_hardened_review_and_final_command_matrix'. The broader matrix the baseline/prompt expect before closeout (npm test, npm run validate, closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp05:matter-core:validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet captured. This is acknowledged by the pack's own notes, not a defect in the delivered descriptor code, and the pack has not flipped production_ready, so no unsupported claim currently exists.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping production_ready, record the full expected validation command matrix green in command-evidence.json (or explicitly scope which commands apply to this descriptor pack) so the eventual production_ready claim is fully evidenced. Do not weaken the gate.
findings.post_review_disposition: Tracked precondition owned by the implementer/closeout pipeline; consistent with the pack's stated gate_outcome. Does not block this review verdict because no production_ready claim is yet asserted.

findings.title: Closeout governance artifacts remain PENDING and must be normalized with this review receipt
findings.details: construction-inspection.json (verdict PENDING, production_ready false), adjudication.md (all P0-P3 pending), and claude-review-result.json (status review_pending, exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run false, no valid receipt) are all in the expected pre-review state. These must be updated to reflect this hardened read-only review's normalized receipt, and production_ready must remain false until human final approval per the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approver false, human_final_approval_required_for_enterprise_trust_claim true).
findings.recommendation: Normalize this review's receipt into claude-review-result.json (rejecting any auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped/missing-field evidence), then complete adjudication and construction-inspection; keep production_ready gated on human approval.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pipeline step after a passing review; no action required from the delivered implementation.

findings.title: changed-file-scope references review artifacts not yet present (produced by this run)
findings.details: active_pack_implementation_refs lists artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-630/raw-output.json and review-receipt.json, which do not yet exist on disk; they are emitted by the review runner after this review completes. Noted for completeness — not a defect, and the unrelated dirty/untracked files (e.g., scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html, workbook/* and the .docx) are correctly listed under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and were not treated as part of this pack.
findings.recommendation: Confirm raw-output.json and review-receipt.json are written and referenced consistently once this review run finalizes; no code change needed.
